privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How PageSense handles your organization's data under Saudi PDPL.

whoWeAre.heading: Who We Are
whoWeAre.body: PageSense is an AI-powered enterprise document intelligence platform developed and operated by Empowering Energy (trading as ESAP AI) (CR No. [Insert CR Number]). We help organizations upload, extract, index, and query their enterprise documents with evidence-backed sources — bilingual Arabic and English, at scale.

role.heading: Our Role: Data Processor
role.body: PageSense operates exclusively in a B2B enterprise context. Your organization is the Data Controller — you determine which documents are uploaded and who uses the platform. Empowering Energy (trading as ESAP AI) acts solely as a Data Processor, processing document data only on your organization's behalf and strictly under your documented instructions.

sensitivity.heading: Data Sensitivity Notice
sensitivity.body: Unlike voice-processing platforms, PageSense does not inherently collect Sensitive Personal Data. However, the documents your organization uploads may contain personal or sensitive data — such as HR records, financial statements, contracts with personal details, medical documents, or government forms. The sensitivity classification depends entirely on the content your organization uploads.
sensitivity.responsibilitiesLabel: Your organization, as Data Controller, is responsible for:
responsibilities: Classifying documents by sensitivity before upload (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted).
Ensuring all documents are lawfully held and authorized for AI processing.
Informing Data Subjects whose personal data appears in uploaded documents, where required by PDPL.

items.label: Uploaded Document Content
items.body: PDF, JPG, and PNG files containing enterprise documents (contracts, policies, reports, records, forms).

items.label: OCR-Extracted Text
items.body: Text extracted from documents using AI-powered OCR engines (Classic PaddleOCR, Qwen VL 2B/9B, DeepSeek, Chandra).

items.label: Vector Embeddings
items.body: Numerical vector representations of document chunks generated using BGE-M3 models, stored in Qdrant and/or PGVector databases.

items.label: User Queries
items.body: Natural language questions submitted by authorized users about document content in Arabic and/or English.

items.label: AI-Generated Answers
items.body: LLM-generated responses with page-level citations and source references.

items.label: Document Metadata
items.body: File names, page counts, processing status, language, upload timestamps, chunk counts, OCR engine used.

items.label: User Account Data
items.body: Names, emails, job titles, company affiliation, access roles (Admin, Client Admin, Client Main).

items.label: Usage and Analytics Data
items.body: Login timestamps, queries submitted, documents accessed, session durations.

why.heading: Why We Process Your Data

rows.purpose: Document ingestion, OCR extraction, and indexing
Platform security and unauthorized access prevention

why.footer: We never process data for advertising, profiling, or any purpose outside the contracted scope.

ai.heading: How We Use AI
items: PageSense uses AI for OCR text extraction, vector embedding generation, semantic retrieval, and grounded question-answering.
All AI-generated answers are assistance tools — not final records, legal interpretations, or binding conclusions.
Every AI output includes page-level citations so users can verify against original source documents.
AI answers should always be reviewed against the original document before use in formal decisions.
We do not use your organization's documents, extracted text, or queries to train AI models without explicit written consent.
We maintain full documentation of OCR engines, embedding models, retrieval algorithms, and LLM providers used.

subprocessors.heading: Data Sharing and Sub-Processors
subprocessors.footer: 30 days' advance notice for any sub-processor changes. Right to object included.

transfers.heading: Cross-Border Data Transfers
items: SDAIA-approved Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs).
Completed Transfer Risk Assessments filed with NDMO.
Encrypted transmission and storage at all international points.
Contractual prohibition on secondary use.

items.label: Access
items.body: Copy of all personal data held (documents, extracted text, queries, answers).

items.label: Correction
items.body: Fix inaccurate metadata or document information.

items.label: Deletion
items.body: Specific documents, all extracted text and associated embeddings, or all data.

items.label: Objection
items.body: Object to processing not in DPA.

retention.heading: Data Retention

rows.period: Duration of contract, then deleted on termination

retention.footer: 30-day data export window on termination. Permanent deletion confirmed in writing.

security.heading: Data Security
items: AES-256 encryption at rest for all documents, extracted text, and embeddings.
TLS 1.3 encryption in transit.
Multi-tenant data isolation — each Client's document collections and embeddings are fully separated.
Role-based access controls with three distinct levels (Admin, Client Admin, Client Main).
Vector database access is restricted to authorized application services only.
Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments.
72-hour SDAIA breach notification and immediate client notification.

contact.heading: Contact and Complaints
contact.complaints: Complaints may be directed to SDAIA at sdaia.gov.sa.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms governing access to and use of PageSense.

agreement.heading: 1. Agreement
agreement.body: These Terms govern access to PageSense at rag.esap.ai, operated by Empowering Energy (trading as ESAP AI) (CR No. [Insert CR Number]). They apply to the Client organization and all Authorized Users. They operate alongside MSA, SOW, and DPA — MSA/DPA takes precedence in conflicts.

description.heading: 2. Description of Service
items: Secure document upload and ingestion (PDF, JPG, PNG).
Multi-engine OCR text extraction (Classic PaddleOCR, Qwen VL 2B/9B, DeepSeek, Chandra).
Bilingual Arabic and English document processing and query support.
BGE-M3 vector embedding generation with dual vector database backends (Qdrant and PGVector).
Page-level document chunking and intelligent segmentation.
AI-powered grounded question-answering with page-level citations and source references.
Hybrid retrieval using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), combining semantic and keyword search.
Answer Workspace for inspecting, comparing sources, and reviewing evidence.
Admin pipeline control for OCR engine, embedding model, vector DB, and preprocessing configuration.
Client Admin portal with fixed enterprise presets for document upload and processing.
Client Main chat interface with suggested prompts for end users.
Document management with status tracking, reprocessing, and deletion.
Developer Mode with full workspace visibility for technical administration.

access.heading: 3. Access and Authorized Users
access.body: Access is granted exclusively to the Client and designated Authorized Users per signed MSA. The platform provides three access levels:

items.label: Client Admin
items.body: Document upload and processing with enterprise presets.

items.label: Client Main
items.body: Document querying and chat interface only.

access.footer: The Client is responsible for credentials, assigning appropriate access levels, and ensuring all users comply with these Terms.

uploadResponsibility.heading: 4. Document Upload Responsibility
uploadResponsibility.intro: The Client bears full responsibility for:
items: Ensuring all uploaded documents are lawfully held and authorized for AI processing.
Classifying documents by sensitivity before upload (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted).
Ensuring personal data within documents is processed under a valid lawful basis under PDPL.
Informing relevant Data Subjects where required by PDPL.
uploadResponsibility.footer: PageSense does not pre-screen or classify uploaded documents. Empowering Energy (trading as ESAP AI) is not liable for the Client's upload of documents containing personal data without a valid lawful basis.

acceptable.heading: 5. Acceptable Use
items: Uploading documents that the Client does not have the lawful authority to process.
Using the platform for personal, non-business purposes.
Reverse engineering the platform, OCR engines, embedding models, or retrieval algorithms.
Using outputs or citations to develop competing products.
Sharing or reselling access.
Using AI-generated answers as the sole basis for legal, financial, or regulatory decisions without human verification against source documents.

aiDisclaimer.heading: 6. AI-Generated Content Disclaimer
items: OCR extraction accuracy varies by document quality, scan resolution, and language complexity.
AI-generated answers may contain errors, omissions, or incomplete citations.
Page-level citations are provided for verification — users must review original source documents before relying on answers.
All outputs are labeled: “AI-generated — verify against source documents before formal use.”
Empowering Energy (trading as ESAP AI) is not liable for decisions made based on AI-generated answers without human review of cited sources.

clientData.heading: 7. Client Data and Content
clientData.intro: The Client retains full ownership of all uploaded documents, extracted text, embeddings, queries, answers, and related content. Empowering Energy (trading as ESAP AI) commits to:
items: Never selling, licensing, or sharing Client Content.
Never using Client Content to train AI models without explicit written consent.
Accessing Client Content only for contracted service delivery, security, or legal compliance.

privacy.heading: 8. Data Processing and Privacy
privacy.body: Governed by the Privacy Policy and signed DPA. Complies with PDPL Royal Decree M/19 of 2021 and its Implementing Regulations.

pricing.heading: 9. Pricing and Commercial Terms
pricing.body: Defined exclusively in a signed MSA or SOW. These Terms do not govern billing independently.

standard.heading: 10. Standard Commercial Terms
standard.body: Intellectual property is exclusive to Empowering Energy and includes platform software, OCR pipelines, embedding algorithms, retrieval systems, branding, and documentation. Confidentiality obligations survive for three years post-termination. Service availability targets 99.5%. Liability is capped at three months of fees. On termination, a 30-day data export window covers original documents, extracted text, and query logs. Governing law is KSA (courts in Riyadh). Changes to these Terms take effect after 14 days' notice.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy & Consent
cookies.subtitle: How PageSense uses cookies to keep sessions secure and measure platform use.

banner.heading: Cookie Notice
banner.title: Cookies on PageSense
banner.body: PageSense sets only strictly necessary cookies — for authentication, session security, and to remember your language and theme. We do not use analytics, advertising, or behavioral tracking cookies.
banner.notice: Uploaded documents, extracted text, vector embeddings, and AI-generated answers are never stored in cookies. They are processed through encrypted pipelines governed by your organization's signed Data Processing Agreement.

table.heading: Cookie Table

rows.name: user_prefs
rows.purpose: Language, display preferences, and appearance settings (Light/Dark).

table.footer: No advertising, retargeting, or behavioral tracking cookies. No cookie data is shared with marketing platforms or data brokers.
